home.heroImageAlt: hero · sangha walking through autumn maples
home.heroTitle: A community for mindful living, in the tradition of Plum Village.
home.heroDescription: You are warmly invited to join us for walking meditation, dharma talks, days of mindfulness, and the simple practice of being present together.
home.visitTitle: Everyone is welcome at Hoa Ưu Đàm.
home.visitDescription: Whether you are new to mindfulness or a long-time practitioner, you are welcome here. Come and join us on our journey.

about.title: A small sangha, rooted in mindfulness.
about.intro: Founded in 2014 by a group of lay practitioners and visiting monastics, Hoa Ưu Đàm grew from quiet living-room sittings into a full community centre. We follow the Plum Village tradition of Zen master Thích Nhất Hạnh — a tradition of engaged, gentle, joyful mindfulness.
about.name: Our name — Hoa Ưu Đàm — refers to the udumbara flower, said in the sutras to bloom only once every three thousand years. It is a reminder of the rare and precious nature of this human life.
about.missionTitle: To offer a refuge for mindful living — and to walk, gently, with everyone who arrives.

pillars.title: Practice
pillars.body: Daily, weekly, and seasonal opportunities to sit, walk, and breathe in community.

pillars.title: Study
pillars.body: Approachable teachings rooted in the suttas and the gentle voice of Plum Village.

pillars.title: Service
pillars.body: Caring for one another and for the world — quietly, persistently, without grasping.

pillars.title: Refuge
pillars.body: A welcoming home for anyone seeking pause, stillness, and the company of kind friends.

peaceWalk.title: Peace Walk & Public Talk
peaceWalk.description: A guided walking meditation through the temple gardens, followed by a public dharma talk on cultivating peace in daily life.

trueLove.title: Retreat: True Love Heals
trueLove.description: A three-day silent retreat exploring the four elements of true love: loving-kindness, compassion, joy, and equanimity.

dayOfMindfulness.title: Day of Mindfulness
dayOfMindfulness.description: Join us for a full day of guided meditation, mindful eating, dharma sharing, and gentle community practice.

morningSitting.title: Daily Morning Sitting & Chanting
morningSitting.description: Online sitting meditation and sutra chanting in Vietnamese and English. Open to all, every morning except Mondays.

heartOfUnderstanding.title: The Heart of Understanding
heartOfUnderstanding.excerpt: On the practice of looking deeply and the wisdom of interbeing.

walkingMeditation.title: Walking Meditation
walkingMeditation.excerpt: A gentle introduction to bringing mindfulness to each step.

fiveTrainings.title: The Five Mindfulness Trainings
fiveTrainings.excerpt: A modern reflection on the ethical foundations of mindful living.

beginningAnew.title: Beginning Anew
beginningAnew.excerpt: A practice for healing relationships and starting fresh.

news.title: From the sangha at Hoa Ưu Đàm.

trueLoveRetreat.title: Weekend Retreat: True Love Heals
trueLoveRetreat.excerpt: Three days of practice on the four elements of true love. Registration opens for the May session.

australiaTour.title: Australia Tour — Peace is the Way
australiaTour.excerpt: Sister Chân Không and the monastic delegation visit Sydney, Melbourne and Brisbane this winter.

togetherFuture.title: Together we have a future
togetherFuture.excerpt: A letter from the elder brothers and sisters on continuing the practice through uncertain times.

exhibition.title: Special exhibition commemorating Thích Nhất Hạnh
exhibition.excerpt: Photographs, calligraphy and personal letters on view in the upper hall through summer.

bankAccount.title: Announcement: new bank account
bankAccount.excerpt: Please update your records — our community account has moved to a new institution this month.

morningSit.title: On-going Morning Sitting Meditation Online
morningSit.excerpt: Join the daily online sit at 6:00 AM. All friends, near and far, are warmly welcomed.
